summary: Extract WorkbenchStore connection, schema, auth, session, and security-audit seams without changing API or SQLite behavior.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This refactor keeps the public facade stable while moving low-coupling responsibilities into focused modules so future BFF work can proceed with less context risk.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_auth_security.py tests/test_workbench_security_audit.py -q
